title: Actually Additions
description: Fan-favorite magitech mod full of fun and useful gadgets
body:
![](https://github.com/Ellpeck/ActuallyAdditions/blob/1.20.4/pics/new_logo.png?raw=true)

A long-time fan favorite, Actually Additions is returning to Minecraft 1.20.4 with brand-new models and textures and lots of overhauls!

Use the Atomic Reconstructor and the Empowerer to turn minerals into powerful crystals that allow the creation of useful machines for processing and sorting items, lasers for wirelessly transporting energy, items and fluids, renewable oil to generate power, and much more.

---

Support the development of Actually Additions!
- [MrBysco's Patreon](https://www.patreon.com/mrbysco)
- [Support Ellpeck](https://ellpeck.de/support), the original creator of the mod, and get some cool visual rewards!
